description: A rancher has used a drone to take aerial photos of a large pasture and needs the agent to count the number of cattle.

nodes.task_description: Stitch the aerial images into a single orthomosaic map of the pasture.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a complete map of the area.

nodes.task_description: Run an object detection model on the map to identify and count all the cattle.

expected_outcome.value: The model identifies and counts 148 cattle in the pasture.

nodes.task_description: Compare the count to the expected number of cattle in that pasture from farm records and report any discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reports that the count of 148 matches the 150 expected, within a reasonable margin of error.
